channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 23, 2026
item.description: Welcome to The VENCAst. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, shifting now into my role as your impartial news anchor. It is Monday, March 23, 2026. Today, we cover escalating tensions in the Middle East, significant election results across...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 22, 2026
item.description: From the global stage to local headlines, tensions escalate in the Middle East, while Europe grapples with internal political shifts and energy concerns. We'll also bring you the latest on a major anti-government protest in Prague and a significant c...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 21, 2026
item.description: Good morning. This is The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events and technological advancements. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, here to deliver today's essential news with precision and clarity. It is Saturday, March 21, 2026....
